title: Require real evidence bundle digests
rawUserRequest: 按项目校准与更新重新校准执行计划，完成工单 3：真实 Evidence Digest；禁止状态说明冒充 Digest，并继续按完整生命周期执行。
outOfScope: Changing provider asset generation format or release tag ordering
Publishing a release or moving an existing tag

sources.reason: Defines Work Item 3 evidence status and digest acceptance.
Canonical record currently separates evidence status and digest fields.
Existing fail-closed validator for state and digest semantics.
Provider-bound evidence generation and release promotion sequence.
Public provider asset identity and integrity validation.
Regression coverage for placeholder and valid digest cases.

riskAssessment.reason: The change tightens deterministic digest validation and provider-asset binding without changing release ordering.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized serial execution and this bounded evidence contract is deterministic.

preReviewWarnings: Verify candidate_prepared remains representable without provider evidence while later states reject placeholders and provider mismatches.
acceptance: candidate_prepared keeps evidenceBundleDigest null with pending provider evidence; candidate_verified and release_published require lowercase 64-character SHA-256 values.
The release workflow and distribution validator bind the digest to generated provider evidence assets and fail closed before promotion on mismatch.
Focused tests cover prepared, placeholder, valid, published, and provider-asset mismatch scenarios.
English and Japanese distribution documentation explain status-versus-digest semantics and fail-closed evidence rules.

declaredIntent.summary: Require real evidence bundle digests for verified and published release states while allowing prepared candidates to remain explicitly unverified.

intent.problem: evidenceBundleDigest can describe a state without proving the provider asset bundle, allowing a release to appear verified without cryptographic evidence.
constraints: Preserve candidate preparation without provider assets.
Do not publish, move, or delete tags.
Fail closed for verified and published states.
intent.rationale: Separate evidence status from cryptographic identity and bind the identity to provider assets before promotion.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: valid digest accepted and published evidence bound

guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized implementation, tests, workflow, governance, and documentation changes for the serial plan.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore the prior evidence validation behavior.
